evals.prompt: Optimize my Next.js site for Core Web Vitals. LCP is 4.2s, CLS is 0.23
evals.expected_output: Identifies specific LCP and CLS issues and implements targeted fixes
expectations: Checks if LCP image has priority prop and sizes attribute
Verifies next/image is used instead of native img tags
Checks for AVIF/WebP format configuration in next.config
Verifies next/font usage (no external font requests causing CLS)
Checks all images have explicit width/height or fill prop
Looks for dynamic content injection above fold causing CLS
Does NOT reference FID (replaced by INP in 2024)
